recommendations.title: War of Likes
recommendations.overview: In order to advance her career in the dynamic world of publicity in Mexico City, Raquel tries to reunite with her high school friend Cecy who has become the queen of social media. But unlike followers, friendships do not come instantly.

recommendations.title: Prime
recommendations.overview: A career driven professional from Manhattan is wooed by a young painter, who also happens to be the son of her psychoanalyst.

recommendations.title: Under the Stars of Paris

recommendations.title: The Bad Seed

recommendations.title: Permanent Midnight
recommendations.overview: Juggling increasing career success and a growing heroin habit, a television comedy writer attempts to go down a path of improvement.

recommendations.title: The Christmas Secret
recommendations.overview: While her life is falling apart, single mother Christine finds a magical family heirloom that leads to love and good fortune during Christmas.

recommendations.title: The Pursuit of Happyness
recommendations.overview: A struggling salesman takes custody of his son as he's poised to begin a life-changing professional career.
